anyOf.title: EvalTemplateId
anyOf.description: An eval template is a pre-defined eval that can be used as a starting point for a new eval.

name.title: Name
name.description: The name of the score. Will be provided to the model so use a descriptive name. Should align to the model's TaskRequirement name if you want to use human evals to evaluate the evaluator's performance.

instruction.title: Instruction
instruction.description: A description of the score, used to help the model understand the goal of the score. Will be provided to evaluator models, so should be written for the model, not the team/user.

type.title: TaskOutputRatingType
type.description: Defines the types of rating systems available for task outputs.

items.title: EvalOutputScore
items.description:
A definition of a score that an evaluator will produce.

Very similar to TaskRequirement, but conceptually different keeping in a separate models.

output_scores.title: Output Scores
output_scores.description: The scores this evaluator should produce.

eval_set_filter_id.title: Eval Set Filter Id
eval_set_filter_id.description: The dataset filter for the eval set.

eval_configs_filter_id.title: Eval Configs Filter Id
eval_configs_filter_id.description: The dataset filter for comparing eval configs.

evaluation_data_type.title: EvalDataType
evaluation_data_type.description: The type of task output data to evaluate.

schema.title: CreateEvaluatorRequest
schema.description: Request to create a new evaluator.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project.
project_id.title: Project Id

task_id.description: The unique identifier of the task within the project.
task_id.title: Task Id
